title: updblobspr
text: updblobspr Specify whether Uniface should use stored procedures when updating BLOB data (SC*) USYS$MSS_PARAMS = updblobspr: on | off Use The option updblobspr works only if segmented fields (also known as the blobs option) is set on . Description If updblobspr (‘Update BLOB field with Stored Procedure’) is set on , then stored procedures will be used to update the BLOB (SC*) fields. Related Links segmented fields Specify whether segmented fields will be stored to large object data types. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
